nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Margery Oughrington was born in 1145, in High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with William II Lord Of West Hall De Legh. She died after 1191.

fr.lifeSummary: Margery Oughrington est née en 1145, à High Legh, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William II Lord Of West Hall De Legh. Elle est décédée après 1191.

ja.High Legh, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヒグ レグ
ja.High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kin: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヒグ レグ
ja.lifeSummary: Margery Oughringtonは1145年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヒグ レグで生まれた。彼女はWilliam II Lord Of West Hall De Leghとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1191年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Oughrington(은)는 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 히그h 레그h에서 태어났다. 그녀는 William II Lord Of West Hall De Legh(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1191년 이후 사망했다.
